overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through the rain-soaked Kabuki district of Night City. The player navigates neon-lit streets, narrow alleys, covered bar areas, and staircases while encountering various NPCs in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with heavy atmospheric fog and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial street with vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk past neon signs and vending machines in the rain

entered.detail: rain-soaked reflective pavement covering the ground
black metal railing separating sidewalk from street
vertical neon sign with Japanese characters and English text
illuminated vending machine advertising burritos with orange branding
large digital advertisement showing a samurai character

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked commercial street at night, lined with neon signs and digital billboards. The camera moves forward along a tiled sidewalk bordered by a metal railing, passing vending machines while wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway with graffiti leading to covered bar area

events.description: enters narrow alleyway with red graffiti from open street
enters covered walkway with outdoor bar seating and hanging lanterns

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alley with graffiti walls and entering the covered bar area

notable_agents.action: person sitting on green bar stool facing the counter

entered.detail: large wall with red spray-painted graffiti art featuring abstract designs
industrial metal scaffolding structure against the building
long counter with stools under a covered roof section
traditional white paper lanterns suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open street into a narrow alley featuring prominent red graffiti on the right wall. The camera continues into a covered walkway with an outdoor bar area, where paper lanterns hang overhead and a person sits at the counter on a green stool.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell connecting lower and upper levels

events.description: begins ascending concrete staircase leaving the bar area

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs through a narrow passage with trash bags visible on the landing

notable_agents.action: person in blue shirt descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: steep concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
pile of garbage bags and debris on the stair landing
heavy metal door with warning signs at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bar area, the camera ascends a narrow concrete stairwell with metal railings. Trash bags are piled on a landing, and a person descends the stairs in the opposite direction. The environment is dimly lit with artificial lighting until reaching a metal security door at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level open-air plaza with street food bar

events.description: exits stairwell into upper level plaza with bar area and neon signage
encounters worker mopping the wet pavement near the outdoor bar

agents.ego_description: walking through the upper plaza past the bar where a worker is mopping and patrons are gathered

notable_agents.action: worker wearing headphones mopping the wet concrete floor with a long mop
person with purple hair sitting at the bar counter using their phone

entered.detail: large illuminated green sign spelling KABUKI on distant building
long bar counter with green stools under bright fluorescent lights
large industrial trash containers against the wall

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell into an upper-level plaza, the scene reveals an outdoor bar under bright fluorescent lights with the green KABUKI sign visible in the distance. A worker mops the wet pavement while patrons sit at the bar, and the camera moves through this moderately crowded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with Kabuki market building and crosswalk

events.description: crosses the street at zebra crosswalk with other pedestrians
approaches the large green KABUKI building with triple vending machines

agents.ego_description: descending from the upper level, crossing the wet street with pedestrians, and walking past the prominent KABUKI building

notable_agents.action: white van driving down the wet street with headlights on
pedestrian with red umbrella crossing the street

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
three adjacent burrito vending machines with orange branding
large digital advertisement displaying COLA with a hand graphic

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends from the upper plaza to street level, crossing a wet intersection with zebra stripes. The camera passes pedestrians with umbrellas and a white van driving by, then approaches the large green KABUKI building with its prominent signage and row of vending machines.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked commercial street through the claustrophobic depths of an alleyway and back out into a bustling urban plaza. It begins by moving along a tiled sidewalk where neon billboards reflect off the wet pavement, before turning into a narrow alley marked by red graffiti. The camera then shifts from the open air into a covered bar area with hanging lanterns, subsequently ascending a dim concrete stairwell past piled trash bags and a descending pedestrian. Upon emerging from the stairwell, the scene opens into a bright, fluorescent-lit upper plaza where a worker mops the floor near patrons and a distant green Kabuki sign. Finally, the camera descends back to street level, crossing a zebra-striped intersection filled with umbrellas and traffic to approach the massive, glowing Kabuki building.
